title: DIY Hairpin Leg Coffee Table
summary: Build this simple and easy coffee table with remote control storage in less than an hour.
description: Build this simple and easy coffee table with remote control storage in less than an hour. The kreg pocket holes give the piece a professional look and feel. It's clean and minimalistic vibe will be the perfect accent piece to any living room.

steps.title: Step 1: Drill Pocket Holes
steps.body: Use the Kreg jig to drill four evenly spaced pocket holes into one side of each 3x4 board. Follow the Kreg instructions to ensure you drill appropriate holes for the thickness of your board.

steps.title: Step 2: Screw Boards Together
steps.body: Glue the boards together and screw the appropriate size screws into the jig holes.

steps.title: Step 5: Screw on Hairpin Legs
steps.body: Place the hairpin legs in each corner and screw them on (ensure your screws are not too long). Visit the blog to find out where to purchase hairpin legs. Stain and seal to your preference.

steps.title: Step 4: Screw on Shelf
steps.body: Screw the shelf boards together and adhere them onto the underside of the table.

steps.title: Step 3: Drill Shelf Holes
steps.body: Using a board the same width as the side boards and two smaller pieces, drill pocket holes for assembly onto the underside of the table top.
